tasks.subject: enable-subsystems-by-default [P2] Run full test suite and verify all tests pass
tasks.description:
Run the full test suite to confirm all existing tests pass without modification after the changes to `index.ts` and `cli.ts`.

No new test files are required for this change. The existing tests already cover all code paths. The key validation is that none of the edits broke any existing assertions.

**Commands to run:**

```bash
# Run all tests across client and server
pnpm test -- --run

# Targeted: server env test (asserts boolFlag defaults — env.ts is unchanged)
pnpm vitest run apps/server/src/__tests__/env.test.ts

# Targeted: shared config schema test
pnpm vitest run packages/shared/src/__tests__/config-schema.test.ts
```

**Key test invariants to confirm:**
- `apps/server/src/__tests__/env.test.ts`: The test that asserts feature flags "default to false" refers to the `boolFlag` Zod schema default in `env.ts`. Since `env.ts` is unchanged, this test must still pass.
- `packages/shared/src/__tests__/config-schema.test.ts`: Confirms `relay.enabled` and `scheduler.enabled` default to `true` in the config schema — unchanged.
- All server route tests, relay tests, and pulse tests must pass.

**Also run type checking and lint:**

```bash
pnpm typecheck
pnpm lint
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `pnpm test -- --run` exits with code 0 (all tests pass)
- `pnpm typecheck` exits with code 0
- `pnpm lint` exits with code 0 (no new lint errors introduced)
- Zero test modifications were made (no existing test files were changed)
tasks.activeForm: Running test suite and verifying all tests pass
